info.title: WC2026 API
info.description: REST API for World Cup 2026 data — teams, groups, matches, and stadiums.

get.summary: List all 12 groups with their teams
Get a group by name (A–L) with standings

parameters.name: round
parameters.description: Filter by round: group, R32, R16, QF, SF, 3rd, final

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: scheduled, live, completed

get.summary: Sandbox live match — test your live-score integration
get.description:
Returns a **fictional** match that automatically cycles through every match phase every 160 minutes,
anchored to UTC midnight: **PRE** → **1H** → **HT** → **2H** → **ET1** → **ET2** → **PEN** → **FT_PEN**.

Goals at minutes **23** (BRA 1–0) and **67** (ARG 1–1). The match stays tied through extra time
and is decided on penalties — **BRA 3–5 ARG**. Covers every state your client needs to handle.

### `match_minute`
Current minute of play (1–120). Included **only in this sandbox endpoint** — not available on
`GET /matches` or `GET /matches/:id`. Use it to drive a match clock during testing.

### `home_pen` / `away_pen`
Penalty shootout scores. `null` for all phases before **PEN**. Mirrors the same fields on real
match responses — `null` means no penalties, integers mean the match was decided on penalties.

### `_sandbox`
Always `true`. Use this flag to distinguish test data from real data.

### `next_phase_in_seconds`
Seconds until the next phase begins. Useful for scheduling a re-fetch at the right moment.

200.description: Fictional live match in the current phase

schema.description: Fictional live match in the current phase

match_minute.description: Current minute of play (1–120). Sandbox only.

home_pen.description: Penalty shootout score for home team. null until PEN phase.

away_pen.description: Penalty shootout score for away team. null until PEN phase.

next_phase_in_seconds.description: Seconds until the next phase begins.
